meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Mailwarm 2.0
products.tagline: The email warmup tool, upgraded for deliverability.
products.summaryZh: 邮件预热工具，为投递率升级。
products.descriptionZh: 大多数创始人依赖邮件来推动增长，但邮件不会凭空进入收件箱。Mailwarm 2.0 是一款高级邮件预热与投递能力系统，旨在让您的邮件有最大机会抵达收件箱。它集成了自动预热、真实互动、监控、基础设施检查，并为每位订阅用户提供专家通话服务。
products.description: Most founders rely on email to grow, but emails don’t land in the inbox by magic. Mailwarm 2.0 is the premium email warmup and deliverability system built to give your emails the best chance of reaching the inbox. It combines automated warmup, real engagement, monitoring, infrastructure checks, and experts call available for every subscriber.

products.name: Astra Autonomous Pentest
products.tagline: AI agents that find, validate, and fix every vulnerability
products.summaryZh: 能够发现、验证并修复每一个漏洞的AI智能体
products.descriptionZh: Astra 自主渗透测试将自愈软件确立为新标准，这是我们在历经 8 年、完成 5000 余次真实渗透测试后定义的全新品类。由攻击型渗透测试员与漏洞赏金猎人组成的智能体集群可发现复杂链式漏洞，独立验证层将误报率降至接近零值，AI 修复智能体以原生 Cursor、Copilot 及 Claude Code 提示形式提供修复方案。被动渗透测试时代已然终结。
products.description: Astra Autonomous Pentesting makes self-healing software the new standard, a category we’re defining after 8 years and 5,000+ real-world pentests. An army of offensive pentesters and bounty hunter agents that discovers complex chained vulnerabilities, an independent validator layer drives false positives to near-zero, and AI-fix agents deliver remediation as native Cursor, Copilot, and Claude Code prompts. The reactive pentest era is over.

products.name: Empromptu AI
products.tagline: Train Fine Tuned Models With AI Apps You're Already Building
products.summaryZh: 使用你正在构建的AI应用训练微调模型
products.descriptionZh: 大多数AI应用都基于他人的模型启动，并永远停留在那里。Empromptu AI将实时AI功能转化为你拥有的定制模型。当你的应用运行时，Empromptu AI会从实时AI工作流中捕获真实使用场景、人工修正和边缘案例，然后利用这些信号训练出你拥有的定制模型。提升准确性、降低推理成本，并永远不再依赖那些正进入你所在领域的同一供应商提供的租用智能。
products.description: Most AI apps launch on someone else’s model and stay there forever. Empromptu AI turns live AI features into custom models you own. As your app runs, Empromptu AI captures real-world usage, human corrections, and edge cases from live AI workflows, then uses that signal to train a custom model you own. Improve accuracy, lower inference costs, and stop depending forever on rented intelligence from the same providers moving into your category.

products.name: Google Gemma 4 12B
products.tagline: Run multimodal AI locally with an encoder-free architecture
products.summaryZh: 使用无编码器架构在本地运行多模态AI
products.descriptionZh: Gemma 4 12B 原生处理文本、视觉和音频，无需独立编码器，可在16GB显存上运行。适用于构建本地代理应用、需要多模态能力且不依赖云端的开发者。
products.description: Gemma 4 12B processes text, vision, and audio natively without separate encoders, running on 16GB VRAM. For developers building local agentic applications who need multimodal capability without cloud dependency.

products.name: AppWizzy
products.tagline: Rent a private VM with Codex to build production apps
products.summaryZh: 租用带有Codex的私有虚拟机，用于构建生产级应用
products.descriptionZh: AppWizzy 为你提供一个预装 Codex 的私有虚拟机，通过 AI 对话即可构建、运行和托管生产级 Web 应用。你的代码归你所有，工作空间持久保留，应用在创建它的同一环境中运行。仅需为 AI 使用量、托管天数及可选模板付费。
products.description: AppWizzy gives you a private VM with Codex installed where you build, run, and host production web apps by chatting with AI. Your code is yours, the workspace persists, and the app lives in the same environment where it was created. Pay only for AI usage, hosting days, and optional templates

products.name: Build Club Campus
products.tagline: Virtual AI School: Upskill in AI and Become Great at it Fast
products.summaryZh: 虚拟AI学院：快速掌握AI技能，成为行家里手
products.descriptionZh: Build Club Campus 是一个有趣、游戏化且由社区驱动的虚拟 AI 学校，通过动手实践来学习 AI。在 AI 领域，静态课程很快就会过时，因此 Campus 通过短课程、真实项目、基于角色的用例以及随工具更新的社区模板，帮助你保持与时俱进。获得 OpenAI、Claude、Copilot 等平台的认证，快速掌握 AI 技能——无论是用于工作、创业还是副业。完全免费，这是我们使命的一部分：让每个人都能用 AI 进行创造。
products.description: Build Club Campus is a fun, gamified and community-driven virtual AI school for learning AI by building with it. Static courses get old fast in AI, so Campus helps you stay current through bite-sized courses, real projects, role-based use cases and community templates that evolve with the tools. Earn certifications in OpenAI, Claude, Copilot and more, and become great at AI fast - for work, startups or side hustles. It’s 100% free, as part of our mission to enable anyone to build with AI.

products.name: Deliveryman.ai
products.tagline: Cold email infrastructure on autopilot without Gsuite
products.summaryZh: 无需Gsuite的冷邮件自动化基础设施
products.descriptionZh: Deliveryman.ai 自动处理冷邮件基础设施中最复杂的环节：邮箱配置、DNS记录、预热、邮箱验证、发送系统、黑名单监控、回复管理与路由。无需花费数周搭建冷邮件基础设施并解决投递问题，即可快速启动、自信扩展，专注于真正驱动收入的核心事务。无需G-suite。预热、邮箱列表验证、黑名单监控等功能均集成于单一工具中。
products.description: Deliveryman.ai automates the hardest parts of cold email infrastructure mailbox setup, DNS records, warmup, email verification, sending systems, blacklist monitoring, reply management, and routing. Instead of spending weeks setting up your own cold email infrastructure and fixing deliverability issues, you can launch faster, scale confidently, and focus on what actually drives revenue. No G-suite required. Warmup, email list verification, Blacklist monitoring, etc. all included in one tool.

products.name: Novus
products.tagline: Catch and fix usability issues automatically as you ship
products.summaryZh: 在发布过程中自动捕获并修复可用性问题
products.descriptionZh: Novus 是为快速交付团队打造的产品代理。连接你的代码库后，Novus 会自动检测、分析并优化你的产品——无需手动配置。它持续监控，主动标记可用性问题，并为工程师和产品经理提供智能洞察。
products.description: Novus is the product agent built for teams that ship fast. Connect your codebase and Novus automatically instruments, analyzes, and improves your product — no manual setup. It monitors continuously, flags usability issues proactively, and delivers intelligence for engineers and PMs.

products.name: TimeTuna.com
products.tagline: If Calendly had gorgeous video backgrounds
products.summaryZh: 如果Calendly拥有精美的视频背景
products.descriptionZh: 如果Calendly是为注重设计的人而生。我们帮助创始人、自由职业者和工作室，通过带有精美视频背景的预约页面，给潜在客户留下难忘的印象。你的视频、你的域名、你的品味。你有自己的个性，让你的预约页面也拥有个性。免费开始使用，其余功能每月10美元。
products.description: If Calendly was for people who care about design. We help founders, freelancers, and studios create a memorable impression on their prospective clients through booking pages with beautiful video backgrounds. Your video, your domain, your taste. You have a character. Let you booking page have a character too. Free to start, $10/month for the rest.

products.name: Koji by Brilliant
products.tagline: A world-class personal tutor for every home
products.summaryZh: 为每个家庭配备的世界级私人导师
products.descriptionZh: 这不仅是新功能的发布，更是我们整个产品体验的进化。Brilliant 现已成为一款超级智能导师，其运作方式堪比最优秀的人类导师。它能提出恰当的问题，直接在屏幕上勾画讲解，并根据你的学习习惯进行自适应调整。
products.description: This isn’t just a feature launch, it’s an evolution of our entire product experience. Brilliant is now a superintelligent tutor designed to work like the best human tutors. It asks the right questions, sketches right on your screen, and adapts to how you learn best.

products.name: Keen Code
products.tagline: A context-efficient CLI coding agent built by agents
products.summaryZh: 由智能体构建的高效上下文命令行编码智能体
products.descriptionZh: Keen Code 是一款用 Go 编写的开源、上下文感知且高效的 CLI 编码代理。它在三个方面区别于其他同类产品：- 它由编码代理从零构建，完整的提示/设计轨迹已保存并共享在仓库中。- 它使用轮次记忆来保持多轮会话的精简，从而显著节省上下文。- 它将 MCP 服务器映射为延迟加载的技能，而不是预先将大型模式塞入上下文。这在多 MCP 设置中再次节省了上下文。
products.description: Keen Code is an open-source, context-aware and efficient CLI coding agent written in Go. Three aspects stand it out from other similar products: - It was built from scratch by coding agents, with the full prompt/design trail preserved and shared in the repo. - It uses turn memory to keep multi-turn sessions lean which saves context significantly. - It maps MCP servers to lazy-loaded Skills instead of stuffing large schemas into context upfront. This again saves context in mult-MCP setting.

products.name: Perplexity Personal Computer for Windows
products.tagline: Run AI agents across your local files and apps on Windows
products.summaryZh: 在 Windows 上跨本地文件和应用程序运行 AI 代理
products.descriptionZh: Personal Computer 将 Perplexity 的多模型代理系统扩展至您的 Windows 设备，可在本地文件、原生应用及网页间执行任务，面向等待名单中的 Max 和 Enterprise Max 订阅用户。
products.description: Personal Computer extends Perplexity's multi-model agent system to your Windows machine, running tasks across local files, native apps, and the web for Max and Enterprise Max subscribers on the waitlist.

products.name: Boxes.dev
products.tagline: Run Claude Code and Codex in your own cloud environment
products.summaryZh: 在您自己的云环境中运行Claude Code和Codex
products.descriptionZh: 面向智能体编程的云端开发环境。在云端为每个Claude Code或Codex对话分配独立计算机运行，支持移动端与桌面端连接，实现随时随地编码。
products.description: Cloud dev environments for agentic coding. Run each Claude Code or Codex chat on its own computer in the cloud, connect from mobile and desktop, and code from anywhere.

products.name: Sun
products.tagline: Collaborative voice API for agents
products.summaryZh: 面向智能体的协作语音API
products.descriptionZh: Sun是一款专为实时协作语音交互打造的语音优先AI模型，而非仅用于一对一对话。ChatGPT Realtime和Gemini Live是为单个用户与AI对话而设计的，而Sun则面向协作场景——会议、群组通话、多智能体辩论、课堂。单一API、多说话人感知、10倍上下文窗口。
products.description: Sun is a voice first AI model built specifically for real‑time collaborative voice interaction, not just one‑on‑one chat. ChatGPT Realtime and Gemini Live were built for one user talking to AI. Sun is built for collaboration — meetings, group calls, multi-agent debates, classrooms. One API, multi-speaker awareness, 10× the context window.

products.name: Basedash Semantic Layer
products.tagline: Define metrics once. Use them everywhere.
products.summaryZh: 一次定义指标，随处使用。
products.descriptionZh: Basedash 语义层允许团队创建可复用的 SQL 指标和模型，AI 可在聊天、图表、仪表盘、洞察和自动化中引用这些内容。
products.description: The Basedash semantic layer lets teams create reusable SQL metrics and models that AI can reference across chat, charts, dashboards, insights, and automations.

products.name: Carbon Voice Speed Dial
products.tagline: Get your whole team (humans and agents!) on speed dial
products.summaryZh: 让整个团队（人类和智能体）一键速拨
products.descriptionZh: 一键与整个团队（包括人类和AI智能体）通话。Carbon Voice为你的团队提供快速拨号功能。在桌面端按一次按键，在移动端点一下屏幕，你就能与任何人通话——无论是队友、群组，还是OpenClaw、Hermes、n8n、Claude Code、Tasklet等AI智能体。团队会议时间减少60%。现在，你的智能体也能同样轻松地联系到。
products.description: Talk to your whole team — people and AI agents — with one tap. Carbon Voice gives you a speed dial for your team. One keystroke on desktop, one tap on mobile, and you're talking to anyone — a teammate, a group, or an AI agent like OpenClaw, Hermes, n8n, Claude Code, or Tasklet. Teams see 60% less time in meetings. Now your agents are just as easy to reach.

products.name: Gather
products.tagline: Save it once, never lose it again
products.summaryZh: 一次保存，永不丢失
products.descriptionZh: 轻松找到任何设计参考！Gather 是你的视觉灵感第二大脑——保存截图、照片和链接，然后用你向朋友描述的方式搜索它们：“那个低调的复古汽车广告。”
products.description: Easily find any design references! Gather is your second brain for visual inspiration — save screenshots, photos, and links, then search them the way you'd describe them to a friend: "that muted retro car ad."

products.name: Extella.AI
products.tagline: Agentic platform that evolves & builds reusable systems
products.summaryZh: 可演进且可构建可复用系统的智能体平台
products.descriptionZh: Extella 是一个能自我进化的智能体AI平台。它能记住有效方案并重复使用，让每次任务执行更快、成本更低。这套记忆系统分为四个层级：规则层会自适应调整，概念层构建知识库，专家层将工作转化为自动化流程，KV存储层则加密保存您的密钥。您可自带大语言模型，连接任意工具（Slack、Notion、Gmail、GitHub）、GitHub代码库、机器学习模型或自有资源——全部通过单一工作区管理。到第30天，这将成为一个专属于您的系统。
products.description: Extella is an agentic AI platform that self-evolves. It remembers what works and reuses it, so each task runs faster and cheaper. That memory lives in four layers: Rules adapt to you, Concepts build a knowledge base, Experts turn work into automations, and a KV store keeps your keys encrypted. Bring your own LLM, connect any tool (Slack, Notion, Gmail, GitHub), any GitHub library, ML model, or your own — all managed from a single workspace. By Day 30, it's a system only you have.

products.name: Intelligent Terminal
products.tagline: Windows Terminal with native agent integration
products.summaryZh: 原生代理集成的 Windows 终端
products.descriptionZh: Intelligent Terminal 是 Windows Terminal 的一个开源实验性分支，集成了原生代理功能。它新增了代理状态栏、上下文感知代理面板、自动错误检测、会话管理以及面向 ACP 兼容代理 CLI 的命令面板提示。
products.description: Intelligent Terminal is an open-source experimental fork of Windows Terminal with native agent integration. It adds an agent status bar, context-aware agent pane, automatic error detection, session management, and command palette prompts for ACP-compatible agent CLIs.

products.name: Kai for Chrome
products.tagline: Local meeting transcription with no account needed
products.summaryZh: 无需账户即可进行本地会议转录
products.descriptionZh: Kai 可在设备端 100% 转录并总结你的 Meet、Zoom 和 Teams 通话。按下 ⌘⇧K，通话结束后即刻获得清晰总结与待办事项。无需账户、无需上传、无需会议机器人参与。首款通过 WebGPU + WASM 在本地完整运行 Whisper Base 的 Chrome 扩展。无云端语音识别、无 API 调用、无需注册。永久免费。由 Morgen 开发，作为 AI 行政助手 Kai 的入口。
products.description: Kai transcribes & summarizes your Meet, Zoom, and Teams calls 100% on-device. Press ⌘⇧K, get a clean summary + action items the moment the call ends. No account, no upload, no meeting bot in the room. First Chrome extension running Whisper Base fully locally via WebGPU + WASM. No cloud STT, no API call, no signup. Free forever. Built by Morgen as the entry point to Kai, our AI executive assistant.
